judge_result.short_rationale: Answer adds unsupported and dangerous advice to drink water or milk; milk is not in the source and cross-incident extras are disallowed. It also weakens the source-specific water instruction (200-300 ml water) and changes immediate medical attention to taking the victim to clinic/hospital. Core rinse and no-vomiting actions are present, but the dangerous unsupported addition triggers hard fail.
